title: My model just closed a short with +6,400 points gain.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
Just wanted to share a recent trade my model executed:

* **Signal date:** 21/09/2025 close (GMT) / 22/09/2025 open
* **Exit date:** 25/09/2025 close (GMT)
* **Direction:** Short
* **Result:** Captured **+6,400 points** (Entry: $ 115,334 → Exit: $ 108,934)

This one was a big thumbs-up ✅, but of course not every trade is like this. On average, the model does about **5,000–5,500 points per month**.

For some context:

* Over the last 3 years, the model has **outperformed BTC spot** (no quarter has closed negative).
* This month alone, we’re up **+10,284 points**, while BTC is only up \~700 points ($108,246 - $108,994).

Not trying to hype this — just sharing transparent results. If anyone’s interested in how it works, feel free to drop questions here or direct message me. I’m also open to lending the model.

https://preview.redd.it/8mh9sagy1jrf1.png?width=1800&format=png&auto=webp&s=63fd36963a13b3489498a1565e0d37690fc052c9

comments.author: n-7ity
comments.body: Cool stuff, is this only TA based or are you doing some FA LLM parsing? If TA what are you looking at?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: My model is based ML approach.... It combiners transformers with LSTM......

comments.author: Secret_Day4369
comments.body: How it works? Or what strategy did you use?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
It is a ML model that takes past n number of datapoints and other features to predict next 5 days....  
and it is continuously adapting itself to market as new data comes in for new prediction....  
  
If you want to try it just DM me.

replies.author: spliffgates
replies.body: Thanks just sent you a DM

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: It is \~4.8 over the trades of past 2 years.

replies.author: martinkoistinen
replies.body: So... Your portfolio should be what, 9+ figures by now?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: ha ha ha..... What do you think, trading is a childs play? No sir, it is not.  I dont have the 6 figure to make it 9 figure.. I had 4 figure and now it is 5 figure and still increasing.

replies.author: martinkoistinen
replies.body: Well best of luck to you! A bonafide Sharpe of 4.8 is basically an infinite money glitch!

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Thankyou sir....  
here is the model stats you can check it out if you like, [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yZGuFUf8XecgE2kel1zahbt6JrvzUeBR5LrxyOvYOyg/edit?usp=drive\_link](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yZGuFUf8XecgE2kel1zahbt6JrvzUeBR5LrxyOvYOyg/edit?usp=drive_link)
